ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment of the review (1 - positive, 0 - negative) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_counts" (
  "word_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word count entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "word" TEXT /* Word being counted */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the word in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_counts_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the review (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the product */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, product owner, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "register_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product owner */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product owned */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the product owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the product owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the product owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_owners_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "variation_name" TEXT /* Name of the product variation */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product variation */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Stock level of the product variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
